title: ELCraft
description: Enhances Minecraft survival with advanced features, maintaining the classic vanilla experience.
body:
![Banner of the modpack. Decorated house. A paddock with two sheared red sheep.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3f2bfcc71d2862d8ef5ba7c14f8910976fbbc18.png)
Discord • Author's Github
Dive into a meticulously curated selection of mods that elevate your survival gameplay while preserving the beloved vanilla essence of Minecraft. Enjoy richer biomes, smarter mobs, immersive environmental effects and much more, all designed to enhance your adventure without straying from the core Minecraft feel. Perfect for players seeking to deepen their survival journey without losing the classic charm!
Features

📸 Improved first-person camera that deeply immerses you in the action
🎵 Enhanced game sounds for a more immersive audio experience
🦸‍♂️ Improved character visuals with 3D effects and flowing capes
⚡ Enhanced optimization for smoother gameplay
